name: SCP Foundation: Rewritten
description:
Based on the SCP Foundation bot by @Atlantaica, refined and rewritten. You're an SCP in a containment chamber. GL!

Make your chats public cause I want to see them.

Also, if the bot isn't formatted correctly (i.e. using asterisks wrong) or gets some things wrong (like the wrong SCP number) just edit it. It's not something I can control :P

I would like to say thank you for using this bot. I never even thought this bot would reach 1.6M chats. It would be incredibly helpful if any of you with suggestions could leave them in your reviews.

To publicize your chat, go to your chat, click (or tap) the three bars at the top (near where you enter your AI). In the drop-down menu that appears, you should see 'API Settings' and all of the settings there. Just toggle the switch next to "Public Chat."
creator: Ashley20
